panels.description:
Displays the current status for the SAS Deployment Operator if found (Detected) in the namespace.

When the operator is deploying SAS Viya it has the following states: PENDING --> RECONCILING --> SUCCEEDED

For this gauge the RECONCILING state is displayed as RUNNING.

targets.expr:
(
  sum(
    kube_pod_status_phase{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"sas-deployment-operator-.*",phase="Unknown"} * 1
  or
    kube_pod_status_phase{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"sas-deployment-operator-.*",phase="Failed"} * 2
  or
    kube_pod_status_phase{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"sas-deployment-operator-.*",phase="Pending"} * 3
  or
    kube_pod_status_phase{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"sas-deployment-operator-.*",phase="Running"} * 4
  or
    kube_pod_status_phase{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"sas-deployment-operator-.*",phase="Succeeded"} * 5
  )
)
OR on() vector(0)

panels.title: Deployment Operator Status

panels.description: Displays the percentage health for the HTTPproxy and an estimated value for the ingress definitions.
